app.reconnectingGameServerDesc: Connection dropped. Trying again — you can keep this tab open.
app.joiningRoundDesc: If the game already started, you’ll appear as a spectator until the next lobby or round.
app.gameServerNotConfiguredBody: Partykit must be running and reachable so players can join the same room.
app.verifyDiscordFailed: Could not verify your Discord account
app.verifyDiscordFailedBody: This room requires a valid Discord sign-in. Try closing and reopening the Activity, or ask the host to turn off strict join verification for testing.
app.discordTokenRequiredBody: The server is configured to verify Discord accounts on join, but no token was sent. Reopen the Activity from Discord or check Partykit JOIN_VERIFY settings.
app.partyJwtRequiredBody: This room expects a short-lived join ticket from the Worker. Enable VITE_USE_PARTY_JWT on the client and map /api/party-jwt to your Worker, or set JOIN_JWT_REQUIRED=false on Partykit for testing.
app.partyJwtInvalidBody: Close and reopen the Activity to refresh your Discord session, then try again. If it keeps failing, check Worker PARTYKIT_JWT_SECRET matches Partykit JOIN_JWT_SECRET.
app.partyJwtMisconfigBody: JOIN_JWT_REQUIRED is on but JOIN_JWT_SECRET is missing on Partykit. Fix deploy vars or turn JOIN_JWT_REQUIRED off.
app.discordErrorHintP1: In Discord: set <code0>VITE_DISCORD_CLIENT_ID</code0>, map <code1>/api/token</code1> to your Worker, and set <code2>VITE_DISCORD_TOKEN_URL</code2> if the app origin differs from the token endpoint.
app.discordErrorHintP2: In the browser, a dev user is used automatically. Use <code0>VITE_DISCORD_MOCK=1</code0> for a fixed mock user and room.
app.partyHostHint: Run Partykit in <code0>server/</code0> (<code1>npm run dev</code1>), then set <code2>VITE_PARTYKIT_HOST=localhost:1999</code2> in <code3>.env</code3>.
app.mockModeBanner: <code0>VITE_DISCORD_MOCK=1</code0> is set — the web profile bar (display name, sign-in, cloud saves) is turned off and you’ll see a fixed “Local dev” player. Remove or unset it in <code1>.env</code1> and restart the dev server to get the normal web experience.

sfx.titleReducedMotion: Sounds are muted while “reduce motion” is on in your system settings
sfx.titleTurnOn: Turn sound effects on (off by default)

game.watchingDesc: You joined after the round started. Listen to the clues — you’ll play when the host starts the next round or returns to the lobby.
game.watchingClueDesc: Players are writing one-word clues. You’ll join the next clue round or after the host returns to the lobby.
game.clueTimerOther: Time left for players to submit
game.imposterBlurb: You have a different word than the crew. Blend in without saying it outright.
game.crewBlurb: Describe it without naming it — the imposter is listening.
game.imposterClueBlurb: Submit a clue word that fits your word without giving it away.
game.crewClueBlurb: Submit a clue word that fits the crew word — the imposter is listening.
game.submitClueDesc: One word (1–40 characters). You can change it until time runs out or everyone submits.
game.clueProfanity: That clue was blocked by the word filter.
game.tabHidden: Tab in background — the timer still runs on the server. Come back before time runs out.
game.tipTitle: Tip: give clues that only someone who knows the real word would understand.

clueReveal.title: Everyone’s clues
clueReveal.desc: Add suspicion to answers that feel off. Anyone can call a vote. The host advances to the next clue round or to voting on the last round.
clueReveal.reduceSuspicionAria: Remove one suspicion mark from this clue
clueReveal.waitHostNext: Waiting for the host to start the next clue round.
clueReveal.waitHostVoting: Waiting for the host to open voting.

voting.watchingDesc: You can’t vote this round. Results will show on the reveal screen.
voting.instructions: Tap a player, then confirm. You can’t vote for yourself.
voting.instructionsV2: Vote to skip (majority skip returns to clues) or accuse a player. Wrong accusation ends the game. You can’t vote for yourself.
voting.skipAria: Vote to skip — majority returns everyone to clue rounds
voting.confirmAriaSelect: Confirm vote — select a player first

reveal.spectatorNote: You joined as a spectator this round — you’ll play normally after the next lobby or round start.
reveal.title: Reveal
reveal.wordsDesc: What each side was working with.
reveal.cluesFromRoundDesc: What players submitted before the vote.
reveal.hostDesc: Everyone else waits for you here.
reveal.nextRoundAria: Start next round with a new word
reveal.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start the next round or return to the lobby.

lobby.waitingDesc: When everyone has joined, the host starts the game. You’ll get a word — or you’ll be the imposter with a different word — then write clue words each round before voting.
lobby.invalidWords: Those words are not valid. Use two different words, 1–40 characters each (after trimming).
lobby.profanity: That pair was blocked by the server word filter. Try different words.
lobby.invalidPack: That word pack is not available.
lobby.emptyPack: This word pack has no pairs to draw from.
lobby.playersDesc: Who’s in this session right now.
lobby.customWordsHost: The host chose custom words for the next round.
lobby.gameRulesHelp: Same word pair for the whole game until the next round. Clue timer and how many clue rounds before the host can move to voting.
lobby.wordPackHelp: Choose a theme for random rounds, roll one pair from the pack, or type / paste your own. Custom pairs stay secret until the round starts.
lobby.pastePlaceholder:
One pair per line, e.g.
Pizza, Burger
Ocean | Lake
lobby.pasteAria: Paste word pairs, one per line
lobby.pasteHint: No valid line found. Use crew, imposter or crew|imposter per line (lines starting with # are ignored).
lobby.startGameHint: Need at least one player (you) to begin.
lobby.onlyHost: Only the host can start. Ask them to tap Start game when ready.
lobby.newLobbyConfirm: Start a new lobby? You will leave this room and join an empty one.
lobby.friendsBlurb: Friends can open this link or enter the code to join the same lobby.
lobby.roomFormat: Shareable codes use the lobby- format; open the site from a normal link to get one.
lobby.discordLobbyHelp: By default everyone in this Activity instance shares one room. Set a room code (4+ characters) so only friends who enter the same code join your game.
lobby.shareCodeHint: Shareable codes use the lobby- prefix; open the site from a normal link to get one.
lobby.savedListsHelp: Save pairs from the box above to your online profile, then pick a random pair or copy a list back into the editor. Lists sync across devices when you use Save progress online, email sign-in, or Sign in with Discord.
lobby.savedListsDeleteConfirm: Delete this saved list from your account?
lobby.savedListsSaveNoPairs: No valid pairs in the paste box. Use one pair per line (crew, imposter).
lobby.savedListsErrName: Enter a name for the list.
lobby.savedListsErrSession: Sign in or enable an online profile to save lists.
lobby.savedListsErrLimit: You’ve reached the maximum number of saved lists. Delete one to add another.
lobby.savedListsErrGeneric: Could not save the list. Try again.
lobby.savedListsRandomOk: Loaded a random pair from the list into the fields.
lobby.savedListsEditorOk: Pasted the list into the box above.

profile.title: Profile
profile.supabaseHint: Add Supabase env vars for optional online profiles.
profile.guestHint: Saved on this device only. No account required.
profile.cloudHint: Synced to your online profile when possible.
profile.accountDesc: Play as a guest by default. Turn on an online profile to keep the same identity when you clear site data, create an email account, or sign in with Discord for a stable account and saved round stats.
profile.footerHint: Switching guest ↔ online changes your in-game user id — you may show as a new player in an open room. In Supabase Auth: enable Email and Discord providers and add your site URL to redirect allow lists.
profile.emailAuthDesc: Create an account or sign in with email and password. Stats sync when you finish rounds with an online profile.
profile.emailPasswordShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
profile.emailConfirmSent: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in here.
profile.passwordResetSent: If that address is registered, you’ll receive a reset link shortly.
profile.recoveryDesc: You opened a password reset link. Choose a new password for your account.
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
profile.settingsDesc: Profile summary, password, and email (email sign-in only).
profile.noEmailOnAccount: No email is stored on this sign-in method.
profile.passwordManagedExternally: Password sign-in is not enabled for this account (for example Discord-only). Use your provider to manage access.
profile.passwordRulesHint: Use at least 6 characters with lowercase, uppercase, and a digit (matches typical Supabase rules).
profile.changeEmailHelp: We’ll send confirmation messages per your Supabase project settings (you may need to confirm old and new addresses).
profile.emailChangePending: Check your inbox to confirm the email change.
profile.noAccountEmailError: This account has no email address to verify.
profile.statsDesc: Totals from finished rounds on this account (updated when each round is saved).
profile.gameHistoryDesc: Rounds saved from games where you used an online profile. Open a row for details.
profile.roundHistoryDesc: Saved when you use an online profile and finish a reveal.
